description: Highlight a range of faces on a solid by face index range. Uses range() to specify which faces to highlight.
utility: Highlight a range of faces on a solid

arguments.name: faceRange
arguments.description: Face index range to highlight (0-based, inclusive)

examples.scenario: Highlight all faces of a solid
examples.expression:
C = cube3d(at(10,10), view(25,25), 3)
A = solidarea(C, range(0, 31), c(red), fo(0.3))

C = cylinder3d(at(10,10), view(25,25), 2, 5)
A = solidarea(C, range(0, 5), c(blue), fo(0.5))
